description: A customer browses a retail website and places an order for several items.

nodes.task_description: Add multiple items to the online shopping cart.

expected_outcome.value: All selected items are successfully added to the cart.

nodes.task_description: Proceed to checkout, enter shipping and billing information.

expected_outcome.value: The customer accurately fills out their address and payment details.

nodes.task_description: Submit the order and receive an order confirmation number and email.

expected_outcome.value: The order is successfully placed, and a confirmation is sent to the customer.
